items.how_used: 论文在Part A和Part B中明确列出多条假设，如丢失物品在步道上、迷路者不在爆炸区等，以缩小搜索范围。
items.source_excerpt: We assumed that the object was lost on one of the trails... We first assumed that the jogger is not in the 'Explosives Area.'

items.how_used: 在Part A中，将区域按步道距离百分比和兴趣点百分比加权（兴趣点权重为2），计算物品在各区域的概率，并据此分配搜索时间。
items.source_excerpt: Assigning a weight of two to the percentage of 'Points of Interest' and a weight of one to the percentage of distance covered by the trails, we calculated the chance that the person would have been in each area.

items.how_used: 论文制作了多幅详细地图（Map A-1至A-5），标注步道、道路、兴趣点、区域划分等，用于可视化搜索路径和区域概率。
items.source_excerpt: This is a detailed map of Hopkinton State Park. We emphasized many aspects of the park... The creation of this particular map, as well as every other subsequent map, took much meticulous work.

items.how_used: 在Part A中，通过测量步道各段长度，规划一条覆盖88%步道的路径，并考虑折返，确保总距离不超过8英里。
items.source_excerpt: To find this path, we determined the total distance we would be able to travel (including backtracking) by multiplying our speed (4 miles per hour) by our time, resulting in a total of 8 miles.

items.how_used: 论文在Part A和Part B的结尾分别讨论了模型的优缺点，包括对假设的敏感性、未考虑因素等，属于定性灵敏度分析。
items.source_excerpt: Strengths and Weaknesses for Our Model in Part A... The weaknesses are that it does not take 'Points of Interest' into consideration... it may not actually be the most effective path.

items.how_used: 引言部分通过生动的场景描述引入问题，并明确说明论文要解决的两个子问题，符合HiMCM竞赛论文的写作风格。
items.source_excerpt: A wedding ring. A pocket watch. A lucky coin... These are the problems set for us, Math Modeling Team #3180. These problems, we solved.
